segments.text: Alright, switching to Mega Bolt here!
segments.original_text: さあどうだメガボルトに変えて

segments.text: When's the timing to go for the KO?
segments.original_text: 欲しい撃墜をどのタイミングで仕掛けにいくか

segments.text: After switching to Mega Bolt here...
segments.original_text: ここでメガボルトに変えてから

full_text: Alright, switching to Mega Bolt here! When's the timing to go for the KO? After switching to Mega Bolt here...
